text:
is the 3rd chapter of the 2nd volume and the 30th chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 Petra's new dress attracts the attention of everyone, except who she wanted to notice. 

Summary

On her day off, Petra decides to wear a new dress she purchased. She wonders how the others will react. Nifa is the first to compliment Petra's dress. Nanaba is the next to admire it, and Lynne asks if they can examine it closer. Petra agrees, pleased with their compliments. Nanaba contemplates the material, Lynne praises the color, and Nifa applauds the design. Petra asks them if the dress looks good on her. Suddenly, the three women turn to leave. Nifa calls back to Petra that she just remembered that she has an appointment elsewhere. Nifa is shocked and asks them if they were only interested in the dress. The three return, Nifa telling Petra that they were only joking. Nanaba guarantees Petra that she will be flirted with if she heads to town wearing the dress. As Petra denies that will happen, Oluo listens from behind a corner. He silently remarks that those events would never happen to Petra, and then he overhears Petra agree to the plan.

Gunther notices Oluo leaving in a fancy suit. Gunther confronts him, telling Oluo that the style doesn't match him at all. Oluo responds that he is heading into town and hoping that he'll meet some women. 

Petra considers going into town, wishing that she could bring Levi with her. Suddenly, Levi passes her, wearing a formal suit. Surprised, Petra calls out to him. Levi asks Petra why she's dressed up, and inquires whether she is also going into town. Avoiding Levi's gaze, Petra gingerly remarks that she was going into town to have some fun. Levi affirms that he has business in town and that their coincidental meeting is perfect timing. Petra excitedly asks Levi if he wants to go into town together, but Levi withdraws some money. Levi requests that Petra save him a trip by buying tea leaves for him.

Having wandered the town, Petra arrived at a bar. Disheartened and sitting at the counter, Petra wishes that she would have ran into someone interested. The barman presents her a plate of food, stating that the gentleman to her left paid for it. Bewildered, Petra turns and sees Oluo staring at her. Petra asks the barman if she can take the meal to go. Outside, Petra is mad at Oluo, demanding to know what he is doing in town dressed formally. Oluo says that he happened to see her by chance and decided to tease her. Oluo then begins to compliment Petra on her dress, but he trips and bites his tongue. He then tries to compliment Petra again, but he bites his tongue again. Annoyed, Petra cries that he doesn't have to force himself to compliment her.

Rain begins to fall heavily, worrying Petra that her dress is going to get soaked. Oluo covers her with his jacket, and together they run for shelter. Impressed at Oluo's behavior, Petra concludes that Oluo is growing on her. Her thoughts are interrupted by noticing the price tag dangling from his jacket. Safe from the rain, Oluo asks Petra if she's okay. Petra thanks Oluo for shielding her from the rain. Petra then is concerned about Oluo's jacket, but he disregards it. Petra says that Oluo looked good in his suit, but Oluo says that he doesn't care now that they are soaked. Arriving back, Oluo and Petra are stopped by Eld. Eld asks Oluo if the wet clothes are the same clothes that he had lent Oluo. Oluo acts confused, provoking Petra to scold him.
